site.title: Computer Vision arXiv Digest
site.description: Daily ranked top 5 cs.CV papers with expandable full listings.

top5.title: Lyra 2.0: Explorable Generative 3D Worlds
top5.summary: Pushes generative 3D world creation toward long-horizon, revisit-consistent exploration by explicitly tackling spatial forgetting and temporal drift in camera-controlled video generation.

top5.title: VideoFlexTok: Flexible-Length Coarse-to-Fine Video Tokenization
top5.summary: Introduces a variable-length coarse-to-fine video tokenizer that cuts token budgets sharply while preserving generation quality, making longer video generation materially more practical.

top5.title: Chain-of-Models Pre-Training: Rethinking Training Acceleration of Vision Foundation Models
top5.summary: Reframes acceleration at the model-family level rather than per-model, reporting large compute savings for vision foundation model pretraining without apparent performance loss.

top5.title: CoD-Lite: Real-Time Diffusion-Based Generative Image Compression
top5.summary: Targets the hard deployment regime for generative compression with a lightweight one-step codec that reports real-time 1080p throughput and major bitrate reduction.

top5.title: VidTAG: Temporally Aligned Video to GPS Geolocalization with Denoising Sequence Prediction at a Global Scale
top5.summary: A strong systems paper for video geolocalization that replaces gallery-heavy image retrieval with frame-to-GPS retrieval and explicit temporal refinement at global scale.

top5.title: Any 3D Scene is Worth 1K Tokens: 3D-Grounded Representation for Scene Generation at Scale
top5.summary: Moves scene generation into an implicit 3D latent space with a dedicated 3D diffusion transformer, directly targeting spatial consistency at scale.

top5.title: Online Reasoning Video Object Segmentation
top5.summary: Reframes reasoning VOS under strict causality and introduces a benchmark plus causal baseline closer to deployment.

top5.title: LottieGPT: Tokenizing Vector Animation for Autoregressive Generation
top5.summary: Native generation of editable vector animation is unusually fresh, backed by a tokenizer and a 660K-animation dataset.

top5.title: POINTS-Long: Adaptive Dual-Mode Visual Reasoning in MLLMs
top5.summary: Targets long-form and streaming visual understanding with an explicit efficiency-accuracy tradeoff.

top5.title: TAPNext++: What's Next for Tracking Any Point (TAP)?
top5.summary: Pushes online point tracking with stronger long-horizon tracking, re-detection after occlusion, and a new evaluation metric.

top5.summary: Reframes future prediction around sparse point-trajectory dynamics for longer-horizon forecasting.

top5.summary: A training-free multi-agent setup for grounded 3D reasoning with planning and geometric verification.
